_comment: SessionStart 自动拉起本地 Bridge：若 17831 未监听且 artifacts/bridge/bridge.mjs 存在，则后台启动；token 优先 CAPTURE_ALL_BRIDGE_TOKEN env，否则 Bridge 自生成并持久化到 $XDG_RUNTIME_DIR/capture-all/bridge_token（mode 0600）。禁止写死 token。

hooks.command: bash -c 'root="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}"; curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://127.0.0.1:17831/health 2>/dev/null | grep -q 200 && exit 0; [ -f "$root/artifacts/bridge/bridge.mjs" ] || exit 0; CAPTURE_ALL_BRIDGE_TOKEN="${CAPTURE_ALL_BRIDGE_TOKEN:-}" nohup node "$root/artifacts/bridge/bridge.mjs" --port 17831 > /dev/null 2>&1 &'
